executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: Whole-stack certification remains blocked by external docs verification failures plus marketing outcome verification still failing closed.
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Do not certify green until docs regains independent-pass status and marketing produces a fresh independent pass backed by measurable Codeberg movement.

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks
live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: Docs quality loop is the top newly-localized external blocker
findings.mechanism: Current health monitor shows the docs verifier artifact still missing independent-pass signoff, the latest docs verifier verdict is fail, and the docs agentic review failed closed after truncated transport output.
findings.root_cause: Docs owner artifacts are red because the Ralph Workflow docs repo state is dirty/ahead/behind and the latest agentic review capture was truncated before producing a full review payload.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the docs owner loop clear the repo publication drift and rerun the agentic review/verifier pipeline to a real independent pass before any whole-stack green claim.

findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification is still not pass and health monitoring now also flags the marketing independent artifact as stale under runtime freshness policy.
findings.root_cause: Primary-repo adoption is still measurement-pending after shipped repairs, so marketing cannot certify healthy outcome movement yet.
findings.recommended_fix: Require a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable Codeberg movement before whole-stack certification.

findings.title: Architecture-owned runtime topology is live-clean but currently busy
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 21 enabled jobs, 5 running jobs, 0 disabled jobs, and 0 live last-error jobs.
findings.root_cause: Architecture/runtime topology is coherent; current risk is carried by external docs and marketing owner loops rather than scheduler drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep using direct live cron inspection each watchdog run and report active runners explicitly instead of freezing topology snapshots at idle state.

findings.title: Architecture verifier path remains repair-sound after refresh
findings.mechanism: The verifier source still enforces freshness against current runtime evidence and independent verification can still separate architecture health from external loop failures.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; remaining blockers are correctly localized outside the architecture owner loop.
findings.recommended_fix: Rerun independent verification immediately after each material architecture artifact refresh.

findings.title: Persisted disabled jobs remain history only
findings.mechanism: Disabled entries still exist in jobs.json history, but live Gateway topology currently exposes zero disabled jobs.
findings.root_cause: Historical scheduler records persist after live job cleanup and must stay separated from live runtime claims.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep separating persisted disabled history from live runtime topology in every audit.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get the docs owner loop back to a real independent pass
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Docs is now the strongest newly localized external blocker and is keeping the whole stack red alongside marketing.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the docs blocker or sharpens the exact docs/runtime repair target without polluting architecture status.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean but active runners changed since the previous audit snapshot.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Prevents stale idle-topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed the audit against the current live view: 21 enabled jobs, 0 disabled jobs, 5 active runners, and 0 live last-error jobs.
Updated the architecture audit to reflect current external blockers from both docs and marketing instead of the earlier marketing-only snapshot.
Rewrote the audit artifacts before rerunning the independent verifier/verifier/checker stack so freshness checks use the current live state.

repairs_applied_this_run.target: architecture independent verifier, verifier, and checker
repairs_applied_this_run.change: Reran independent verification plus verifier/checker after the audit refresh; independent verdict is qualified_pass and the architecture gate command passed.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh docs independent pass after repo publication drift and truncated agentic-review capture are cleared.
Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Docs and marketing both remain externally red while architecture-owned runtime checks are clean
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Whole-stack green would currently be false because docs publication/verification is broken and marketing still lacks measurable primary-repo movement.

live_running_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

notes: Architecture green here means the architecture-owned verifier path is coherent; it does not mean docs or marketing are green.
Persisted disabled jobs remain history only; live disabled jobs are 0.
Independent live inspection in this snapshot saw 21 total jobs, 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 5 running, and 0 live last-error jobs.
The remaining blockers are docs publication/verification drift and marketing outcome evidence, not architecture runtime drift.
